recommendations.title: Hedwig and the Angry Inch
recommendations.overview: Raised a boy in East Berlin, Hedwig undergoes a personal transformation in order to emigrate to the U.S., where she reinvents herself as an 'internationally ignored' but divinely talented rock diva, inhabiting a 'beautiful gender of one'.

recommendations.title: Shortbus
recommendations.overview: In post-9/11 New York City, an eclectic group of citizens find their lives entangled, personally, romantically, and sexually, at Shortbus, an underground Brooklyn salon infamous for its blend of art, music, politics, and carnality.

recommendations.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
recommendations.overview: In 1970s London, a teenage outsider named Enn falls in love with a rebellious alien girl named Zan, who has come to Earth for a party. Together, they navigate the complexities of intergalactic culture and the trials of first love.

recommendations.title: Wolf Children
recommendations.overview: After her werewolf lover unexpectedly dies in an accident, a woman must find a way to raise the son and daughter that she had with him. However, their inheritance of their father's traits prove to be a challenge for her.

recommendations.title: Easy!
recommendations.overview: The life of a melancholy professor is turned upside down when he discovers that a rebellious teenager he is tutoring is actually his son.

recommendations.title: The Vow
recommendations.overview: Happy young married couple Paige and Leo are, well, happy. Then a car accident puts Paige into a life-threatening coma. Upon awakening she has lost the previous five years of memories, including those of her beloved Leo, her wedding, a confusing rela

recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: The Next Three Days
recommendations.overview: A married couple's life is turned upside down when the wife is accused of murdering her boss. Her husband John would spend the next few years trying to get her released, but there's no evidence that negates the evidence against her. When the strain o

recommendations.title: The Lookout
recommendations.overview: Chris is a once promising high school athlete whose life is turned upside down following a tragic accident. As he tries to maintain a normal life, he takes a job as a janitor at a bank, where he ultimately finds himself caught up in a planned heist.

recommendations.title: Desire
recommendations.overview: In a social context deteriorated by a countrywide economic crisis, the life of several people will be turned upside down after they meet Cécile, a character who symbolizes desire.
